scripts.api:generate: npm run api:download && openapi-generator-cli generate -g typescript-angular -i openapi/edumatch.openapi.json -o src/app/generated --skip-validate-spec --global-property=apiDocs=false,modelDocs=false,apiTests=false,modelTests=false --additional-properties=ngVersion=21.0.0,providedIn=root,stringEnums=true,useSingleRequestParameter=true,serviceSuffix=Api,fileNaming=kebab-case
